result.executive_summary: CONCENTRATE LONG in 3 A-grade catalyst names: ORCL 15% (EARNINGS_BEAT 6/10, +44% 20d momentum, 11-engine convergence), WDC 13% (PRODUCT_LAUNCH multi-quarter, exabyte +22% YoY, +195 alpha_spy), CRM 10% (GUIDANCE_RAISE, 40% repeat bookings, +13.5% idio_alpha). Pair-trade CRM long / INTU short (+25% spread) and NEM long / GFI short (+9% spread) for hedged exposure. Monitor semi-earnings cluster 6/2-6/3 (PANW/CRWD momentum leaders, AVGO laggard — trim 50%). 68% deployed; DELL/IBM early detection signals support cluster thesis but wk52_proximity >97% indicates extended technicals. Macro NEUTRAL; avoid D-grade sympathy (ARM/MU) without catalysts.
result.macro_frame: NEUTRAL regime favors tactical concentration in A-grade catalyst names over broad exposure. Tech leadership in cloud/AI infrastructure (MSFT, ORCL, WDC) and agentic enterprise (CRM) anchors the bias. Semi-earnings cluster 6/2-6/3 provides near-term volatility; avoid D-grade sympathy moves (ARM, MU) without independent catalysts.
